---
title: "Analysis of Class Data"
author: "Elijah Kearl"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
execute: 
  warning: false
    
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd 
import numpy as np
import sqlite3
import folium
from folium.plugins import HeatMap
from lets_plot import *

LetsPlot.setup_html(isolated_frame=True)
```



```{python}
BUILDINGS = {
        "ASC": [43.826870640685534, -111.88549751753085], 
        "Ag Engineering Bldg": [43.81345880643873, -111.78324346388294], 
        "Austin": [43.81602094160326, -111.78433750806025], 
        "Benson": [43.81542818516958, -111.78332931738849],
        "Clarke": [43.82028905100857, -111.78171856563219], 
        "ETC": [43.81418502185512, -111.78314595016181], 
        "Hart": [43.81959162394444, -111.7857075397191], 
        "Hinckley": [43.81591145361786, -111.77987288445603], 
        "MC": [43.8185565017281, -111.78256470845697], 
        "Ricks": [43.814850021172795, -111.78099334180233],
        "Romney": [43.820304271261755, -111.78318931968305], 
        "STC": [43.81458723923863, -111.78429023101532], 
        "Smith": [43.81917896874557, -111.78147799511062], 
        "Snow": [43.82128809081587, -111.78363435973117], 
        "Spori": [43.82083016022857, -111.78240927161345], 
        "Taylor": [43.81708501479656, -111.78245269740484],
        "University Comm Bldg": [43.81736526696351, -111.77942076274879],
        "McKay": [43.81937794824518, -111.78319755563858],
    }
```

# Class Foot-traffic Heatmap (TOTALS)

```{python}
conn = sqlite3.connect("parsed.db")


query = """
SELECT schedule_building, SUM(seats_taken_count), schedule_time_start
FROM courses
GROUP BY schedule_building;
"""

table = pd.read_sql_query(query, conn)



map_object = folium.Map(location = [43.816267187242595, -111.78185114232832], zoom_start = 15 )

# build a simple lookup from the query results so we don't scan the
# dataframe on each iteration
seats = table.set_index('schedule_building')['SUM(seats_taken_count)'].to_dict()

# create the list we feed to folium/HeatMap in one comprehension;
# BUILDINGS is left unchanged, preventing later unpack errors.
data = [
    [lat, lon, int(seats.get(b, 0))]
    for b, (lat, lon) in BUILDINGS.items()
]


for lat, lon, amount in data:
    folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[lat, lon],
        radius=15,                # Adjust to change the "hoverable" area
        fill=True,
        color=None,               # Removes the border
        fill_opacity=0,           # Makes it invisible
        tooltip=amount, # Show on hover
        popup=f"Total: {amount}"     # Show on click
    ).add_to(map_object)

HeatMap(data).add_to(map_object)

map_object

```


# Class Foot-traffic Heatmap (MAX TIME FRAME)

As we see below, at 11:30 on Wednesday the campus has the most amount of students with 6,778 attending classes at once. 

```{python}
conn = sqlite3.connect("parsed.db")


query = """
SELECT weekday, SUM(seats), time_start
FROM meetings
GROUP BY time_start, weekday
ORDER BY SUM(seats) DESC;
"""

table = pd.read_sql_query(query, conn)

print(table.head(10))
```

Below a Heatmap of this data (students on campus at 12:45) is included


```{python}
conn = sqlite3.connect("parsed.db")


query = """
SELECT weekday, building, SUM(seats), time_start
FROM meetings
WHERE time_start = '11:30' AND weekday = 'wed'
GROUP BY building;
"""

table = pd.read_sql_query(query, conn)

map_object = folium.Map(location = [43.816267187242595, -111.78185114232832], zoom_start = 15 )

# turn the query result into a plain dict: {building: total_seats}
seats = table.set_index('building')['SUM(seats)'].to_dict()

# build the list of [lat, lon, amount] in one go; do not touch BUILDINGS
data = [
    [lat, lon, int(seats.get(b, 0))]
    for b, (lat, lon) in BUILDINGS.items()
]


for lat, lon, amount in data:
    folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[lat, lon],
        radius=15,                # Adjust to change the "hoverable" area
        fill=True,
        color=None,               # Removes the border
        fill_opacity=0,           # Makes it invisible
        tooltip=amount, # Show on hover
        popup=f"Total: {amount}"     # Show on click
    ).add_to(map_object)

HeatMap(data).add_to(map_object)

map_object
```
